HOW IT WORKS

Get an Account From a Prop Firm of Your Preference

Sign up With Us For Passing the Evaluation Stage

Start Earning Real Money on Weekly Basis

Become a Funded Trader after Evaluation

OUR SERVICES

This is where we get you funded

CHALLENGE PASS

In less than 15 trading days, we will successfully PASS the trading parameters of the first stage of evaluation phase to advance into the verification stage which usually tends to be 10% or 8% depending on preferred prop firm.

VERIFICATION PASS

Before getting Funded we will also have to PASS the second stage which is verification by hitting half the target which is 5% or 4% of the account balance.

EARN REAL MONEY

FUNDED ACCOUNT MANAGEMENT

We aim for a minimum of 10% – 15% gain every month on all account sizes. Our profit split rate is 30% of the total profit figure whereas account owner you remain with 50% and prop firm secure their share of 10%.

Benefits Of Being Funded

Being Funded Allows You To Have Capital That You As A Retail Trader Wouldn’t Be Able To Come Up With Or, You Don’t Have Enough Time Due To A Busy Schedule, Risking Your Own Money Or Life Savings In This Case Can Be More Complicated Than Using Someone Else’s Money To Trade And You Get To Keep 90% Of Whatever Is Made After Being Funded.

Rather than attempting to double or triple a $500 live account, which often results in unrealistic targets and failure, we recommend seeking funding. By starting with a funded account of $100,000, you can aim for a more achievable 10% return. This approach allows for earnings with reduced risk, pressure, and greed.

Know Our Trading Style

Our Company Consists Of 42 Professional, Experienced And Profitable Traders Who Execute Trades MANUALLY Using Various Strategies Based On Pure Price Action And Smart Money Concepts. Also, We Utilize Highly Secured VPNs, Since Some Prop Firms Don’t Allow The Use Of EAs, Copy Trading Softwares And The Use Of Same Strategy On Different Accounts.

We Are Fully Aware Of Such And We Are Doing Our Very Best To Make Sure We Don’t Violate Any Trading Parameters While Meeting Their Profit Target In The Time Provided And Ensure That All Of Our Clients Receive Funding.

24/7 Committed Customer Support
Professional And Disciplined Traders
No Copy Trading (EAs)
Use Of Highly Secured VPNs
Trading With Proper Risk Management
Realistic ROI Of Not Less Than 10%

CHALLENGES & VERIFICATION

You are now ready to submit your account for evaluation pass service. Carefully select the account size that was purchased from a Prop Firm and let us PASS the evaluation for you. Our Dedicated Team of Traders will start trading your evaluation as you complete the checkout process.

10K Challenge

$ 100 /

Service Fee

  • Passing Challenge & Verification
  • Not Passed- 100% Refund & Verification
  • Fresh and Accounts with Drawdown
  • One Time Payment
  • 20 days max to Pass
  • 24/7 customer support

Hear What Our Happy Clients Say

Testimonial #1 Designation

So far so good, passed. They have passed my 100K ftmo verification phase in 14 days not in 10 days as promised by support agent nonetheless so far so good I'm now funded. Would definitely recommended.

Testimonial #2 Designation

Challenge and verification passed has promised. I had enormous drawdown in my $200K Myforexfunds Account what with their help they managed to breakeven and pass both targets and I'm now a funded trader.

Testimonial #3 Designation

Highly recommended! I approached them with a 6% loss on my FTMO account. Explained to me the risk but willing to help me recover the account with their out standing strategies managed to pass the FTMO challenge.

Testimonial #1 Designation

I completed phase one on my own but I was in phase 2. Only 14 days left to complete my second phase thanks for successfully passing my 2nd phase. They are now managing my funded account. Highly recommended!

  • We understand how upsetting it is to lose the challenge since every trader goes through this process. But with our service you can learn while also implementing our teachings into your own trading!
